Typical limits: 20–30 tons on ice crossings, up to 40 tons on fortified areas. For heavy cargo (over 40 tons), we organize special passages with reinforced ice sheets.
avto_dfo.gruzy_pribyvayushchie_morem_v_m: Cargo arriving by sea to Magadan, by railway to Neryungri or Tynda, must be transported to the final address. The driving range is from 50 to 2,000 km on highways and winter roads.
avto_dfo.integratsiya_s_morskim_i_zh_d_p: Integration with sea and railway arms
avto_dfo.kak_vybiraem_skhemu_dostavki: How to choose a delivery scheme
avto_dfo.kazhdyy_marshrut_v_dfo_individu: Each route in the Far Eastern Federal District is an individual project. We select transport, the number of stages and timing, taking into account the season and road conditions
avto_dfo.kogda_nuzhna_avtodostavka_na_se: When do you need auto delivery to the North?
avto_dfo.morskoe_plecho_vladivostok_maga: Sea shoulder Vladivostok - Magadan, transshipment at the port by motor transport, delivery along P-504 to Susuman. A single contract for the entire chain.
avto_dfo.nuzhna_dostavka_v_trudnodostupn: Need delivery to a hard-to-reach area?
avto_dfo.ob_ekty_kapital_nogo_stroitel_s: Capital construction projects in areas without permanent transport infrastructure: bridges, roads, power plants, residential complexes. Delivery of reinforcement, concrete, formwork, special equipment.
avto_dfo.otsenivaem_massu_gabarity_khrup: We evaluate the mass, dimensions, fragility and urgency. We determine the final delivery point and the availability of access roads to the facility.
avto_dfo.pacific_star_dostavlyaet_gruzy_: Pacific Star delivers cargo not only between major hubs, but also to end points - rotational camps, fields, construction sites. Federal highways, primers and seasonal winter roads of Yakutia, Magadan region, Chukotka and Transbaikalia.
avto_dfo.perevozim_vsyo_chto_mozhet_potr: We transport everything that industrial enterprises and the population of the North may need
avto_dfo.perevozka_gsm_i_nalivnykh_gruzo: Transportation of fuels and lubricants and liquid cargo. Compliance with ADR requirements. Delivery of diesel fuel and gasoline to gold mining sites, construction sites and diesel power plants.
avto_dfo.po_transsibu_ili_bamu_do_blizha: By Trans-Siberian or BAM to the nearest railway station (Neryungri, Tynda, Taksimo, Novaya Chara), then by road to the field or populated area. Savings of up to 40% compared to a purely automobile route from central Russia.
avto_dfo.podbiraem_tip_transporta_pod_ko: We select the type of transport for a specific route, season and cargo characteristics
avto_dfo.polnoprivodnye_gruzoviki_6x6_i_: All-wheel drive trucks 6x6 and 8x8 for winter roads, dirt roads and off-road. Load capacity 10–15 tons. Indispensable for delivery to fields, rotational camps and settlements outside the main routes.
avto_dfo.poslednyaya_milya_posle_morya_z: The last mile after the sea/railway
avto_dfo.posyolki_oymyakonskogo_verkhoya: Villages of Oymyakonsky, Verkhoyansky, Momsky districts of Yakutia, internal territories of the Magadan region. Delivery of food, fuel, construction and household goods for the local population.
avto_dfo.pri_neobkhodimosti_delim_marshr: If necessary, we divide the route into parts: railway to the station, reloading onto vehicles, delivery to the site. We coordinate the joining of stages without downtime.
avto_dfo.promyshlennoe_oborudovanie_buro: Industrial equipment, drilling rigs, generators, transformers, modular buildings. Unit weight - up to 20 tons on standard transport, up to 60 tons on trawls.
avto_dfo.rasschitaem_stoimost_podberyom_: We will calculate the cost, select transport and route, organize delivery to the final point - from a large hub to a rotational camp. We work all year round.
avto_dfo.realizovannye_proekty_po_avtodo: Implemented projects for auto delivery to hard-to-reach areas
avto_dfo.sezonnye_dorogi_po_zamyorzshim_: Seasonal roads along frozen rivers and taiga. December - March. Access to Oymyakon, Verkhoyansk, Batagay, Arctic regions.
avto_dfo.standartnye_evrofury_dlya_perev: Standard Eurotrucks for transportation along federal highways A-360, P-504, M-55. Optimal for delivery of general cargo to Yakutsk, Neryungri, Tynda and other large cities on asphalt roads.
avto_dfo.standartnyy_paket_dogovor_na_pe: Standard package: transportation contract, waybill, power of attorney for the driver. For oversized cargo - a special permit for transportation. For dangerous goods - ADR driver's certificate, accident card. We prepare all documents.
avto_dfo.stoimost_zavisit_ot_vesa_ob_yom: The cost depends on weight, volume, type of transport and season. Approximately: from Vladivostok or Khabarovsk to Yakutsk - from 8,000 ₽ per ton (tent, 20 tons). Winter road - surcharge 30–50%. Exact calculation - within 24 hours after application.
avto_dfo.tarno_shtuchnye_gruzy_palety_ya: Packaged goods, pallets, boxes, bags. Food, household goods, spare parts, components. Delivery of combined shipments from several senders is possible.
avto_dfo.tayanie_vechnoy_merzloty_i_polo: Melting permafrost and flooding make dirt roads impassable. Axle load restrictions on highways A-360 and P-504. We plan deliveries in advance: we deliver maximum cargo during the winter period or use alternative routes.
avto_dfo.tentovannaya_fura_vezdekhod_kam: A tilt truck, a KAMAZ/Ural all-terrain vehicle, a low-loader trawl or a tanker truck - we select equipment for a specific task and road condition.
avto_dfo.vremennye_dorogi_po_zamyorzshim: Temporary roads along frozen rivers and taiga. They open at stable frosts below −25 °C. They allow you to deliver heavy loads to areas that are completely inaccessible in summer: Oymyakon, Verkhoyansk, Batagai, Srednekolymsk. The carrying capacity of ice crossings is 20–40 tons, depending on the thickness of the ice.
avto_dfo.yakutsk_magadan_2_032_km_edinst: Yakutsk - Magadan, 2,032 km. The only land connection with the Magadan region. 7–12 days from Yakutsk.
avto_dfo.yakutsk_mirnyy_tulun_1_789_km_g: Yakutsk - Mirny - Tulun, 1,789 km. Dirt road to the diamond mining center and further west. Difficult areas.
avto_dfo.zh_d_dostavka_do_stantsii_novay: Railroad delivery to the Novaya Chara station on the BAM, transshipment onto trawls, delivery along a dirt road to the construction site. Coordination of special permits for oversized cargo.
avto_dfo.zh_d_iz_moskvy_do_vladivostoka_: Railway from Moscow to Vladivostok → sea to Magadan → car along P-504 to Susuman → winter road to the mine. One application, one contract, one invoice. We coordinate all stages and are responsible for end-to-end deadlines.
avto_dfo.zimnik_rasputitsa_letniy_grunt_: Winter road, muddy road, summer soil - we determine the optimal window for sending. If deadlines are tight, we offer an alternative route or a multimodal scheme.
avto_dfo.zimniki_obychno_otkryvayutsya_v: Winter roads usually open in December–January with stable frosts below −25 °C and operate until the end of March–beginning of April. Exact dates depend on the specific route and decisions of road authorities. We monitor the condition of winter roads and notify customers about the opening.
avto_dfo.zolotodobycha_bodaybo_almazy_mi: Bodaibo gold mining, Mirny diamonds, Neryungri and Elgi coal, oil and gas from the Chayandinskoye field. Delivery of equipment, consumables, fuels and lubricants and food to sites without railways or berths.

kabotazh.20_i_40_futovye_konteynery_refr: 20- and 40-foot containers, refrigerated containers. Regular lines with weekly departures to Kamchatka, Sakhalin, and Magadan.
kabotazh.anadyr_pevek_egvekinot_providen: Anadyr, Pevek, Egvekinot, Provideniya. Navigation June - October. 8–14 days on the way. Northern Sea Route, icebreaker support possible.
kabotazh.baziruemsya_v_nakhodke_znaem_sp: We are based in Nakhodka. We know the specifics of each port of the Far Eastern Federal District: depths, berths, restrictions, local stevedores. We minimize downtime.
kabotazh.da_organizuem_strakhovanie_gruz: Yes, we arrange cargo insurance along the entire route. We work with trusted insurance companies. We especially recommend insurance for expensive equipment, machinery and highly fragile cargo.
kabotazh.da_perevozim_avtomobili_spetste: Yes, we transport cars, special equipment, wheeled and tracked vehicles by rolling over (Ro-Ro). Loading on your own or using port equipment. Directions: Vladivostok - Korsakov, Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky, Magadan.
kabotazh.dlya_konteynernykh_gruzov_stand: For container cargo - standard palletization, fastening inside the container with straps or spacers. General cargo must be packaged taking into account sea conditions: protection from moisture, corrosion and mechanical damage. We help with the choice of packaging and control the fastening during loading.
kabotazh.do_kamchatki_magadana_chukotki_: There is no railway to Kamchatka, Magadan, Chukotka and the Sakhalin Islands. The road to Magadan is seasonal and expensive. The sea is the only reliable route.
kabotazh.dogovor_na_perevozku_zayavka_s_: Transportation contract, application with a description of the cargo (name, weight, volume, number of pieces), shipping documents. For dangerous goods - additional permits and safety data sheets. We help with the preparation of all documents.
kabotazh.dostavlyaem_gruzy_iz_vladivosto: We deliver cargo from Vladivostok to all key ports of the Far East
kabotazh.dostavlyaem_gruzy_morem_mezhdu_: We deliver cargo by sea between Russian ports in the Far East: Sakhalin, Magadan, Kamchatka, Chukotka. Containers, general cargo, rolling equipment. Year-round navigation on main routes, regular flights from Vladivostok.
kabotazh.ezhenedel_nye_reysy_na_osnovnyk: Weekly flights on main routes. Predictable deadlines and a stable schedule for planning the logistics of your enterprise.
kabotazh.formiruem_partiyu_organizuem_po: We form a party and organize loading onto the ship. Cargo condition monitoring, securing according to maritime standards. GPS monitoring along the route.
kabotazh.gps_treking_sudna_operativnye_u: GPS tracking of the vessel, prompt status notifications, photo reports during loading and unloading. Personal manager is in touch.
kabotazh.gruz_pribyvaet_v_port_naznachen: The cargo arrives at the port of destination. We organize unloading and, if necessary, delivery by road to the recipient's warehouse or facility.
kabotazh.kamchatka_i_magadan_nezamerzayu: Kamchatka and Magadan are ice-free ports with year-round navigation. Sakhalin (ferry Vanino - Kholmsk) - all year round. Chukotka (Anadyr, Pevek, Egvekinot) - navigation from June to October, if necessary with icebreaker assistance.
kabotazh.kogda_kabotazh_optimal_noe_resh: When cabotage is the best solution
kabotazh.konteynernye_linii_pozvolyayut_: Container lines allow you to ship tens and hundreds of tons per trip. The cost per ton is significantly lower than air or truck transportation.
kabotazh.legkovye_avtomobili_gruzoviki_s: Passenger cars, trucks, special equipment, wheeled and tracked vehicles. Loading under your own power or using port equipment.
kabotazh.metallokonstruktsii_promyshlenn: Metal structures, industrial equipment, building materials, machinery. Sending according to accumulation or individual schedule.
kabotazh.morskaya_dostavka_mezhdu_portam: Sea delivery between Russian ports is in demand in industries where volumes, regularity and cost per ton are important
kabotazh.morskaya_perevozka_mezhdu_porta: Sea transportation between Russian ports is more profitable than air and road transportation in most scenarios
kabotazh.morskoe_plecho_avtodostavka_na_: Offshore shoulder + auto delivery to the drilling site. Individual fastening scheme on the vessel, cargo insurance. Coordination with the port of Korsakov for unloading non-standard dimensions.
kabotazh.morskoy_kabotazh_v_3_5_raz_desh: Sea cabotage is 3–5 times cheaper than air delivery and 1.5–2 times cheaper than road transportation on dirt roads of the Far East.
kabotazh.mul_timodal_naya_dostavka_zh_d_: Multimodal delivery: railway from Moscow to Vladivostok, transshipment at the port, sea route to Magadan. Docking of arms without container downtime at the terminal.
kabotazh.neftegazovye_kompanii_gornodoby: Oil and gas companies, mining enterprises. Drilling equipment, pipes, spare parts for equipment, chemicals. Transportation with increased requirements for securing and insurance.
kabotazh.nezamerzayushchiy_port_kruglogo: Ice-free port, year-round navigation. Distance from Vladivostok ~2,300 km, 5–7 days on the road. Weekly container flights.
kabotazh.nuzhna_morskaya_dostavka_na_dal: Do you need sea delivery to the Far East?
kabotazh.oformlyaem_dogovor_gotovim_kono: We draw up an agreement, prepare a bill of lading and shipping documents. If necessary, we will organize delivery of cargo to the port of Vladivostok.
kabotazh.ot_zayavki_do_vygruzki_v_portu_: From application to unloading at the port of destination - a transparent process at every stage
kabotazh.perevozim_vse_vidy_morskikh_gru: We transport all types of sea cargo on regular and charter flights
kabotazh.petropavlovsk_kamchatskiy_nezam: Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky is an ice-free port. Weekly flights from Vladivostok, 4–5 days. Containers, general cargo, Ro-Ro equipment.
kabotazh.porty_korsakov_i_kholmsk_parom_: Ports of Korsakov and Kholmsk. The Vanino - Kholmsk ferry operates all year round. Direct flights Vladivostok - Korsakov: 2–3 days. Main cargo: food, building materials, equipment.
kabotazh.pryamye_kontrakty_s_sudokhodnym: Direct contracts with shipping companies - without intermediaries. Guaranteed slots on ships during high season.
kabotazh.rabotaem_na_marshrutakh_dal_neg: We have been working on Far East routes since 2012
kabotazh.rasschitaem_stoimost_podberyom_: We will calculate the cost, select the nearest flight and organize door-to-door delivery. We work with containers, general cargo and Ro-Ro.
kabotazh.regulyarnye_perevozki_dlya_seti: Regular transportation for retail chains. Full cycle: acceptance of cargo at a warehouse in Vladivostok, loading, freight, unloading at the port, delivery to the recipient's warehouse.
kabotazh.riteylery_i_distrib_yutory_snab: Retailers and distributors supplying stores in the Far Eastern Federal District. Food, household appliances, everyday goods. Weekly container sailings with a predictable schedule.
kabotazh.sakhalin_korsakov_kholmsk_2_3_s: Sakhalin (Korsakov, Kholmsk): 2–3 days. Kamchatka (Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky): 4–5 days. Magadan: 5–7 days. Chukotka (Anadyr, Pevek): 8–14 days during the navigation period.
kabotazh.stoimost_zavisit_ot_napravleniy: The cost depends on the direction, type of container (20' or 40', dry or refrigerated) and season. Approximately: Vladivostok - Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky from 85,000 ₽ for 20', Vladivostok - Magadan from 95,000 ₽. Exact calculation - within 24 hours after application.
kabotazh.stroykompanii_podryadchiki_infr: Construction companies, contractors of infrastructure projects in Sakhalin, Kamchatka, Magadan. Cement, fittings, metal structures, modular buildings - everything that needs to be delivered in batches and on time.
kabotazh.ugol_shcheben_pesok_ruda_tsemen: Coal, crushed stone, sand, ore, cement. Delivery to ports with suitable bulk cargo unloading infrastructure.
kabotazh.vy_opisyvaete_gruz_i_napravleni: You describe the cargo and destination - we calculate the cost, select the nearest flight and agree on conditions within 24 hours.
kabotazh.zabiraem_gruz_ot_otpravitelya_d: We pick up the cargo from the sender, deliver it to the port, charter the vessel, organize unloading and delivery to the recipient’s warehouse - “door to door.”

negabarit.balki_fermy_truby_bol_shogo_di: Beams, trusses, large diameter pipes, tanks, containers. Long cargo up to 24 m or more - on specialized sliding platforms.
negabarit.beryom_na_sebya_vse_vzaimodeys: We take care of all interactions with regulatory authorities and infrastructure owners
negabarit.blok_konteynery_vakhtovye_goro: Block containers, camps, modular buildings, cabins. Oversized in height and width - require special permits and support.
negabarit.da_my_organizuem_mul_timodal_n: Yes, we organize multimodal transportation: road transport + railway platforms + sea vessels. This is especially true for delivery to Sakhalin, Kamchatka, and remote areas of Yakutia and the Far East. We select the optimal combination based on dimensions, weight and timing.
negabarit.dlya_mul_timodal_nykh_marshrut: For multimodal routes - selection of a berth with the required lifting capacity of cranes, coordination of loading/unloading schemes with the port, control of fastening on the vessel.
negabarit.dostavka_po_federal_noy_trasse: Delivery along the federal highway and winter road to the deposit. We received a special permit within 48 hours. We organized unloading by two cranes onto a prepared site. Delivery temperature: up to −42°C.
negabarit.drobil_naya_ustanovka_na_mesto: Crushing plant for the field - 82 tons
negabarit.drobilki_mel_nitsy_konveyernye: Crushers, mills, conveyor systems, quarry-class dump trucks. Delivery to fields, including hard-to-reach areas.
negabarit.ekskavatory_bul_dozery_avtokra: Excavators, bulldozers, truck cranes, loaders, drilling rigs. Transportation on low-loader trawls with a lifting capacity of up to 100 tons.
negabarit.est_negabaritnyy_gruz_obsudim_: Do you have oversized cargo? Let's discuss the problem.
negabarit.generatory_silovye_transformat: Generators, power transformers, boilers, production lines, compressor stations. Development of individual fastening schemes.
negabarit.kazhdaya_perevozka_pod_persona: Each transportation is under the personal management of a project manager
negabarit.kazhdyy_marshrut_proektiruetsy: Each route is designed individually, taking into account the weight and size characteristics of the cargo and the limitations of the road infrastructure
negabarit.kombinatsiya_avtomobil_nogo_zh: A combination of road, rail and sea transport. The optimal scheme for delivery to Sakhalin, Kamchatka, and Yakutia.
negabarit.kontrol_pogruzochnykh_rabot_ra: Control of loading operations. Development of a fastening scheme for each load. Use of chains, tie-down belts, special stops.
negabarit.kontrol_razgruzochnykh_rabot_n: Control of unloading work at the site. The act of acceptance and transfer. If necessary, organize storage and last mile delivery.
negabarit.linii_elektroperedach_kontaktn: Power lines, contact networks, tunnels, arches - we record every obstacle when surveying the route. We will coordinate the raising of wires or temporary disconnection with network companies.
negabarit.marshrut_proektiruetsya_na_osn: The route is designed based on the dimensions and weight of the cargo. The engineer analyzes the load capacity of bridges and overpasses, the height of power lines, turning radii, and the condition of the road surface. If necessary, travels to the site to take measurements. The result is a detailed route map indicating coordination points.
negabarit.marshrutnoe_proektirovanie_ras: Route design, load calculation, selection of transport and fastening systems. Assessment of technical feasibility of transportation.
negabarit.mashiny_prikrytiya_speredi_i_s: Cover vehicles in front and behind with flashing lights. Ensuring safety in narrow areas, turns, intersections.
negabarit.modul_nyy_kompleks_dlya_vakhto: Modular complex for a rotational camp - 12 modules
negabarit.mul_timodal_naya_perevozka_avt: Multimodal transportation: truck delivery to the port of Nakhodka, loading onto a ship, sea crossing to Korsakov, unloading and truck delivery to the construction site. We developed a scheme for placing modules on the deck.
negabarit.negabaritnaya_perevozka_eto_de: Oversized transportation involves dozens of factors, each of which can stop a project. We work them out in advance
negabarit.negabaritnym_schitaetsya_gruz_: Oversized cargo is considered to be cargo that exceeds standard transport dimensions: width more than 2.55 m, height more than 4 m, length more than 20 m or weight more than 44 tons (including the vehicle). Such cargo requires special permission, route development and, as a rule, escort.
negabarit.oformlenie_spetsrazresheniy_v_: Registration of special permits in Rosavtodor. Coordination with the traffic police, road owners, power line operators. Standard mode is 48 hours.
negabarit.otsenivaem_kachestvo_pokrytiya: We evaluate the quality of the coating, the load-bearing capacity of the areas, and the presence of restrictions on axial load. For critical areas, an engineer will visit.
negabarit.otslezhivanie_transporta_v_rea: Real-time vehicle tracking. The client gets access to the track and transportation status through a personal notification.
negabarit.perevozim_tyazhelovesnye_i_kru: We transport heavy and large-sized cargo throughout Russia. Route design, obtaining special permits, loading and unloading, support. Multimodal solutions for industrial, energy and construction facilities.
negabarit.perevozim_vsyo_chto_ne_vpisyva: We transport everything that does not fit into standard dimensions: width, height, length or weight
negabarit.perevozka_s_avtomobilyami_sopr: Transportation with escort vehicles. Real-time GPS monitoring. Coordination with road services along the route.
negabarit.polnyy_tsikl_ot_obsledovaniya_: Full cycle - from cargo inspection to delivery at the facility
negabarit.prishlite_foto_i_gabarity_rass: Send us a photo and dimensions - we will calculate the cost, design a route and organize turnkey transportation.
negabarit.prorabatyvaem_2_3_varianta_mar: We are exploring 2-3 route options to reduce risks. We take into account seasonality, repair work, and weather conditions.
negabarit.proverka_krepyozhnykh_elemento: Checking fasteners at every stop. Documenting the condition of the cargo at all stages of transportation.
negabarit.proveryaem_gruzopod_yomnost_ka: We check the load-carrying capacity of each bridge along the route. If necessary, we work out detours or coordinate reinforcement of structures.
We check the load-carrying capacity of each bridge along the route. If necessary, we design bypass routes or strengthen structures. We coordinate with balance holders.
negabarit.rasschitaem_stoimost_sproektir: We will calculate the cost, design the route and organize turnkey transportation. Send a photo, dimensions and weight of the cargo - we will respond within 24 hours.
negabarit.real_nye_proekty_kotorye_my_re: Real projects we have implemented for clients
negabarit.soglasovanie_marshruta_poluche: Coordination of the route, obtaining permission to move with cover vehicles. Organizing road closures if necessary.
negabarit.soglasovanie_peresecheniya_zh_: Coordination of the intersection of railway tracks with JSC Russian Railways. Ensuring the safe passage of heavy vehicles.
negabarit.soglasovanie_proezda_pod_liniy: Coordination of passage under power lines. Organization of lifting or disconnecting wires in high-rise oversized buildings.
negabarit.spetsrazreshenie_na_perevozku_: Special permit for the transportation of heavy and bulky cargo. Calculation of compensation for damage to road surfaces.
negabarit.sproektirovali_marshrut_s_ob_e: We designed a route that would bypass two bridges with a limited load capacity. We agreed on raising power lines in three sections. They were delivered with a traffic police escort and 130 tons were unloaded by crane onto the substation foundation.
negabarit.standartnyy_srok_ot_3_do_10_ra: The standard period is from 3 to 10 working days, depending on the category of the road and the number of approval authorities. As usual, Pacific Star issues permits within 48 hours for routes on federal roads. For routes involving regional and municipal roads, the period may increase.
negabarit.stoimost_zavisit_ot_gabaritov_: The cost depends on the dimensions and weight of the cargo, distance, complexity of the route, the number of approvals, the need for escort vehicles and special equipment for loading and unloading. Send a photo and dimensions of the cargo - we will calculate the cost within 24 hours.
negabarit.trebuetsya_spetsial_noe_razres: A special permit is required for the transportation of heavy and large-sized cargo (issued by Rosavtodor or regional authorities). If necessary, the following are agreed upon: driving across bridges, crossing railway tracks, removing or raising power lines, blocking sections of the road. Pacific Star handles all permits on a turnkey basis.
negabarit.turbiny_sektsii_vetrogenerator: Turbines, sections of wind generators, power transmission line supports, substations, switchgears. Comprehensive delivery to energy facilities.
negabarit.vesennyaya_rasputitsa_ogranich: Spring thaw, axle load restrictions, winter roads with weight limits. We plan transportation times taking into account seasonal windows and road conditions in the Far Eastern Federal District.
negabarit.vyezd_inzhenera_na_ploshchadku: Departure of an engineer to the site. Measurements of mass, length, width, height. Photo recording, determination of the center of gravity and slinging points.
negabarit.vysota_liniy_elektroperedach_s: The height of power lines, the width of the roadway, turning radii, tunnels - each section is analyzed for passability.

rail.da_organizuem_perevozku_negabaritny: Yes, we organize the transportation of oversized and heavy cargo on specialized platforms (conveyors). rail.dizel_noe_toplivo_benzin_masla_dlya: Diesel fuel, gasoline, oils for northern boiler houses, industrial facilities. Tanks, tank containers. Delivery within the framework of northern delivery programs.

rail.dlya_rayonov_s_sezonnymi_avtodoroga: For areas with seasonal roads, railways are the only year-round ground transport. The Trans-Siberian Railway and the BAM connect the Far East with central Russia without dependence on winter roads.

rail.konteyner_po_zh_d_do_blizhayshey_st: Container by rail to the nearest station, then auto delivery to the recipient's warehouse. Relevant for Yakutia (Neryungri station), Transbaikalia, and remote areas of the Far Eastern Federal District.
rail.konteynernye_i_vagonnye_otpravki_po: Container and wagon shipments throughout the Russian Railways network. Transsib, BAM, access lines. Railways are a key link in multimodal routes for delivering goods to the Far East, Siberia and northern regions.
rail.minimal_nyy_ob_yom_sbornaya_otpravk: The minimum volume is a combined shipment of 100 kg as part of a container. rail.oborudovanie_dlya_neftegazovogo_pro: Equipment for an oil and gas project - 14 containers
rail.organizovali_konteynernyy_poezd_do_: We organized a container train to Vanino along the BAM, a ferry to Sakhalin and auto delivery to the construction site. Save 35% compared to the all-car route.
rail.ostav_te_zayavku_podberyom_optimal_: Leave a request - we will select the optimal delivery scheme, calculate the cost and timing. Containers, wagons, multimodal routes.
rail.otkrytyy_vagon_gruzopod_yomnost_yu_: Open car with a carrying capacity of up to 70 tons. For bulk cargo: coal, crushed stone, ore, scrap metal. Loading from above with a crane or grab.
rail.pacific_star_organizuet_polnuyu_tse: Pacific Star organizes a complete chain “from door to door”: cargo collection by road transport, delivery to the departure station, railway transportation, unloading at the destination station and delivery to the recipient’s warehouse. rail.podbiraem_tip_podvizhnogo_sostava_p: We select the type of rolling stock according to the nature of the cargo, volume and route

rail.pri_rasstoyanii_svyshe_1_000_km_sto: For distances over 1,000 km, the cost per ton-kilometer by rail is 2–3 times lower than that of road transport. The Trans-Siberian Railway and the BAM are the main arteries for freight in the eastern direction.

rail.regulyarnyy_mul_timodal_nyy_servis_: Regular multimodal service: refrigerated containers along the Trans-Siberian Railway to Vladivostok, transshipment onto a coastal vessel and delivery to Petropavlovsk-Kamchatsky. Continuous temperature control.
rail.sravnivaete_marshruty_pomozhem_vybr: Comparing routes? We'll help you choose.

rail.zh_d_do_vanino_po_bamu_dalee_paromn: Railway to Vanino along the BAM, then ferry to Sakhalin (Kholmsk) or by sea to the ports of the Sea of ​​Okhotsk. The shortest route to the island.
rail.zh_d_do_vladivostoka_dalee_morskoe_: Railway to Vladivostok, then the sea route to Sakhalin, Magadan, Kamchatka, Chukotka. Basic scheme of northern delivery for container cargo.
rail.zh_d_morskoe_plecho_gruz_na_ostrova: Railroad + sea shoulder = cargo to the islands and ports of the Far Eastern Federal District
rail.zh_d_perevozka_ne_universal_noe_res: Railroad transportation is not a universal solution. But in a number of scenarios it significantly outperforms motor transport and even the sea shoulder
rail.zh_d_soobshchenie_s_kitaem_zabaykal: Railway connections with China (Zabaikalsk, Grodekovo, Makhalino), Mongolia (Naushki), Kazakhstan. Registration of customs documents, forwarding along the entire route.
rail.zheleznaya_doroga_rabotaet_kruglogo: The railway operates year-round and does not depend on the weather, road conditions or navigation period. Regular container services with a fixed schedule.
rail.zheleznaya_doroga_redko_rabotaet_iz: Railroads rarely operate in isolation. For most destinations, Pacific Star builds a combined chain: railway + sea, railway + road, railway + river. This allows you to deliver cargo from any region of Russia to the final recipient on the islands and ports of the Far Eastern Federal District - through a single operator, without breaks in the chain.
rail.zheleznodorozhnaya_perevozka_stanov: Rail transportation becomes more profitable than road transportation when the distance is over 1,000 km and the cargo volume is from 5 tons. For container shipments along the Trans-Siberian Railway, the cost per ton-kilometer is 2–3 times lower than that of road transport. At the same time, the railway provides a stable schedule and does not depend on weather conditions.

severnyy_zavoz.20_i_40_futovye_konteyner: 20- and 40-foot containers, including refrigerated ones. Food, industrial goods, equipment, household appliances.
severnyy_zavoz.arkticheskaya_logistika_p: Arctic logistics are tied to navigation windows - it is important to plan ahead
severnyy_zavoz.avtomobili_spetstekhnika_: Cars, special equipment, snowmobiles, all-terrain vehicles. Transportation on deck under its own power (Ro-Ro) or in containers.
severnyy_zavoz.dizel_generatory_transfor: Diesel generators, transformers, boiler equipment for energy facilities and housing and communal services in the northern territories.
severnyy_zavoz.dostavlyaem_gruzy_v_klyuc: We deliver cargo to key ports of the Arctic zone and hard-to-reach areas of the Far East. We use coastal lines, multimodal schemes “railway + sea + road” and direct flights during the navigation season along the Northern Sea Route.
severnyy_zavoz.gotovim_polnyy_paket_po_4: We are preparing a complete package according to 411-FZ: status of Northern Delivery cargo, shipping documents, applications for subsidies.
severnyy_zavoz.gps_kontrol_na_vsyom_mars: GPS control along the entire route, prompt notification of status. Photo report during unloading at the port of destination.
severnyy_zavoz.gruz_iz_tsentral_noy_ross: Cargo from central Russia to Chukotka requires a railway to Vladivostok, transshipment at the port, sea passage, and sometimes road delivery to the site. We coordinate the entire chain as a single project.
severnyy_zavoz.gruz_sleduet_po_marshrutu: The cargo follows a route with GPS monitoring. If necessary, icebreaker assistance along the Northern Sea Route.
severnyy_zavoz.medikamenty_prodovol_stvi: Medicines, essential food, life support goods. Priority processing and reduced turnaround times.
severnyy_zavoz.morskaya_navigatsiya_v_bo: Sea navigation to most Arctic ports is limited to the summer-autumn period. In winter, delivery is possible by winter roads to individual settlements of Yakutia, by air (urgent cargo) or with icebreaker assistance along the NSR for large shipments.
severnyy_zavoz.mul_timodal_naya_dostavka: Multimodal delivery to replace a boiler house in an Arctic village. We developed a deck fastening scheme and coordinated the unloading with the Tiksi port authorities. The winter road was used for removal from the port.
severnyy_zavoz.navigatsionnoe_okno_na_ch: The navigation window to Chukotka and the Arctic is only 4–5 months. If the cargo does not leave with the nearest ship, the next shipment will be only in a year. We control every stage so that you do not miss your flight.
severnyy_zavoz.navigatsiya_na_chukotku_a: Navigation to Chukotka (Anadyr, Pevek, Egvekinot) opens in June and lasts until October. To the port of Tiksi (Yakutia, Laptev Sea) - from July to October. Icebreaker support by FSUE Atomflot nuclear icebreakers allows you to expand the navigation window.
severnyy_zavoz.oformlenie_statusa_gruza_: Registration of the Northern Delivery cargo status, preparation of shipping documents, applications for transportation subsidies.
severnyy_zavoz.oformlenie_strakhovogo_po: Providing insurance coverage for the entire route - from the sender's warehouse to the port of unloading. We work with trusted insurers.
severnyy_zavoz.organizovali_dostavku_tvy: We organized the delivery of solid fuel for the heating season. Loading in Vanino, unloading with grabs in Egvekinot. Documents under 411-FZ provided subsidies for transportation.
severnyy_zavoz.organizuem_dostavku_gruzo: We organize delivery of goods to Arctic ports and hard-to-reach areas of the Far East: Anadyr, Pevek, Egvekinot, Tiksi, Provideniya. We work according to 411-FZ with full documentary support.
severnyy_zavoz.organizuem_razgruzku_v_po: We organize unloading at the port of destination and draw up documents. We deliver to the final recipient by road or by winter road.
severnyy_zavoz.organizuem_vyvoz_iz_porta: We organize removal from the port and delivery to the final recipient - by road or on winter roads.
severnyy_zavoz.osnovnoy_period_morskoy_d: The main period of sea delivery to Arctic ports. Chukotka (Anadyr, Pevek, Egvekinot) - from June. Tiksi - from July. Specific dates depend on ice conditions each year.
severnyy_zavoz.ot_zayavki_do_dostavki_pr: From application to delivery - a transparent process at every stage
severnyy_zavoz.podbor_optimal_nogo_marsh: Selection of the optimal route taking into account navigation windows, ice conditions and ship call schedules. Cost calculation within 24 hours.
severnyy_zavoz.polnyy_spektr_gruzov_seve: Full range of Northern Delivery cargo in accordance with 411-FZ
severnyy_zavoz.polnyy_tsikl_logistiki_se: Full cycle of Northern delivery logistics - from planning to unloading at the port of destination
severnyy_zavoz.port_na_kraynem_vostoke_c: A port in the far east of Chukotka, at the entrance to the Bering Strait. A stronghold for coastal villages. Navigation: June - October.
severnyy_zavoz.port_v_yakutii_na_beregu_: Port in Yakutia on the shores of the Laptev Sea. Key hub of the Northern Sea Route. Navigation: July - October.
severnyy_zavoz.port_v_zalive_kresta_chuk: Port in the Gulf of Cross, Chukotka. The key point of Northern delivery for the western regions of Chukotka. Navigation: June - October.
severnyy_zavoz.prinimaem_gruz_na_sklad_v: We accept cargo to a warehouse in Vladivostok, form a shipment, and organize loading. Photo recording during container filling.
severnyy_zavoz.priyom_gruzov_na_sklad_fo: Reception of goods to the warehouse, formation of batches, loading onto the ship. Storage until shipment - without additional costs under standard terms.
severnyy_zavoz.prodovol_stvennye_tovary_: Essential food products; coal and solid fuel; medicines and medical products; goods for public utilities; construction materials for social facilities; industrial goods for the livelihood of the population; equipment for energy facilities.
severnyy_zavoz.rasschitaem_stoimost_i_sr: We will calculate the cost and terms within 24 hours. We work according to 411-FZ with full documentary support. We are accepting applications for navigation 2026.
severnyy_zavoz.real_nye_zadachi_kotorye_: Real problems we solved for clients
severnyy_zavoz.rekomenduem_formirovat_za: We recommend submitting applications 2–3 months before the start of navigation. This allows you to reserve a place on the ship, draw up documents in accordance with 411-FZ and submit an application for subsidies.
severnyy_zavoz.samyy_severnyy_gorod_ross: The northernmost city in Russia (69° N). Arctic port with icebreaker support. From Vladivostok - ~4,200 km, 12–15 days.
severnyy_zavoz.severnyy_zavoz_dostavka_g: Northern delivery - delivery of goods to the Arctic and the Far North
severnyy_zavoz.severnyy_zavoz_gosudarstv: Northern Delivery is a state program for providing vital goods to hard-to-reach areas of the Arctic and Far East. Regulated by Federal Law No. 411-FZ of June 13, 2023 “On Northern Delivery”. The law defines the list of cargo, delivery territories, a single maritime operator and a mechanism for subsidizing carriers.
severnyy_zavoz.sformirovali_partiyu_iz_4: We formed a batch of 48 containers (32 refrigerated + 16 dry) for a chain of retail stores. We completed documents in accordance with 411-FZ and ensured an uninterrupted cold chain. Delivered on time - before the start of the storm season.
severnyy_zavoz.situatsii_v_kotorykh_nash: Situations in which our experience and resources are critical to the success of northern delivery
severnyy_zavoz.soglasovyvaem_sudno_datu_: We agree on the vessel, loading date and planned arrival date. We take into account the type of cargo, temperature requirements and the availability of port infrastructure.
severnyy_zavoz.stoimost_zavisit_ot_tipa_: The cost depends on the type and volume of cargo, destination port, departure date and the need for icebreaker assistance. Leave a request with a description of the cargo - we will calculate the cost and timing within 24 hours.
severnyy_zavoz.stolitsa_chukotki_krupney: Capital of Chukotka. The largest port in the region. Navigation: June - October. From Vladivostok - about 4,000 km, 10-14 days on the road.
severnyy_zavoz.stroitel_nye_materialy_me: Construction materials, metal structures, machinery and equipment. Large and heavy shipments on deck and in the hold.
severnyy_zavoz.tovarosoprovoditel_nye_do: Shipping documents, transportation contract, application for inclusion in the Northern Delivery cargo register (for subsidies). Pacific Star takes care of paperwork under 411-FZ and interaction with the Northern Delivery operator.
severnyy_zavoz.tyazhyoloe_oborudovanie_m: Heavy equipment, modules, special equipment - transportation that requires the selection of a vessel with the required crane lifting capacity, calculation of fastenings and unloading schemes in a port without developed infrastructure.
severnyy_zavoz.ugol_shcheben_pesok_tseme: Coal, crushed stone, sand, cement. Delivery of solid fuel for the needs of municipal services in Arctic villages.
severnyy_zavoz.v_mezhnavigatsionnyy_peri: During the non-navigation period, delivery is possible by winter roads (Yakutia), by air (urgent cargo) or with icebreaker assistance along the NSR for large shipments.
severnyy_zavoz.v_nachale_i_kontse_naviga: At the beginning and end of navigation, ships travel with icebreaker escort along the Northern Sea Route. This increases the time and cost, but allows you to expand the delivery window by 1-2 months.
severnyy_zavoz.vklyuchenie_gruzov_v_rees: Inclusion of cargo in the register of northern delivery, interaction with a single maritime operator, registration of subsidies for transportation - we take care of the bureaucracy so that you can focus on your main work.
severnyy_zavoz.vy_opisyvaete_gruz_my_ras: You describe the cargo - we calculate the cost within 24 hours, taking into account navigation windows and ice conditions along the route.
severnyy_zavoz.yakutsk_khandyga_zyryanka: Yakutsk, Khandyga, Zyryanka, Chersky - along the Lena, Indigirka, Kolyma rivers. Navigation: June - September. Multimodal delivery.
severnyy_zavoz.zabroniruyte_mesto_na_sud: Reserve your seat on the boat in advance. The earlier the application, the more options for dates and costs.

ved.baziruemsya_v_nakhodke_znaem_portovu: We are based in Nakhodka. We know the port infrastructure of Vladivostok, Nakhodka, Vostochny - where imports are accepted, how transshipment works, who to work with on site.
ved.da_koordiniruem_tamozhennoe_oformlen: Yes, we coordinate customs clearance: we help prepare documents, select the HS code, calculate duties and fees. We work with trusted customs brokers in the ports of Vladivostok and Nakhodka.
ved.est_zadacha_po_mezhdunarodnoy_logist: Do you have a task related to international logistics?
ved.ezhednevno_stroim_marshruty_more_zh_: Every day we build routes “sea + railway + road” for cabotage and northern delivery. The same principles work for international cargo: from the port to the final recipient.
ved.iokogama_kobe_osaka_avtotekhnika_zap: Yokohama, Kobe, Osaka. Automotive equipment, spare parts, industrial equipment. 3–7 days to the ports of Primorye. Direct lines and with transhipment in Busan.
ved.kakie_zadachi_pomogaem_reshat: What problems do we help solve?
ved.kazakhstan_uzbekistan_kyrgyzstan_avt: Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, Kyrgyzstan - road and railway transportation. Simplified registration within the EAEU. We are developing this direction together with our partners.
ved.konsolidatsiya_gruzov_ot_tryokh_kore: Consolidation of cargo from three Korean suppliers into one container. The customer saves about 40% compared to three separate shipments. Coordination of documents from each supplier.
ved.konsul_tiruem_po_neobkhodimym_sertif: We advise on the necessary certificates: declaration of conformity, phytosanitary or veterinary certificate, certificate of origin. We help you get it.
ved.koordiniruem_podgotovku_deklaratsii_: We coordinate the preparation of the declaration for goods: classification according to the Commodity Nomenclature of Foreign Economic Activity, calculation of duties and VAT, submission through trusted brokers in the ports of Primorye.
ved.mezhdunarodnaya_logistika_estestvenn: International logistics is a natural continuation of the work we have been doing in the Far East since 2012
ved.mezhdunarodnaya_logistika_eto_ne_tol: International logistics is not only about freight. We undertake coordination of the process at every stage
ved.minimal_nogo_ob_yoma_net_dlya_nebol_: There is no minimum volume. For small shipments we use groupage containers (LCL): your cargo travels together with other shipments, which reduces the cost. For large shipments - whole containers (FCL) on regular lines.
ved.morem_iz_kitaya_shankhay_ninbo_tsind: By sea from China (Shanghai, Ningbo, Qingdao) - 7–14 days to Vladivostok. From Busan (Korea) – 3–5 days. From Japan (Yokohama, Kobe) - 3–7 days. The period depends on the line schedule and the need for transshipment.
ved.mul_timodal_naya_dostavka_mezhdunaro: Multimodal delivery: international sea route from Shanghai, transshipment in Vladivostok, coastal flight to Korsakov. Connection of international and domestic arms without downtime.
ved.na_chyom_osnovan_nash_opyt: What is our experience based on?
ved.neskol_ko_realizovannykh_zadach_koto: Several completed tasks that reflect our approach to international logistics
ved.ob_yasnyaem_raznitsu_mezhdu_fob_cif_: We explain the difference between FOB, CIF, EXW and other terms. We recommend the optimal delivery basis, taking into account the route and your capabilities.
ved.obsudit_zadachu_po_ved: Discuss the task on foreign trade activities
ved.opyt_raboty_s_konosamentami_transpor: Experience with bills of lading, waybills, insurance documents for coastal and inland transportation. This skill is transferred to foreign trade activities without loss of quality.
ved.organizuem_dostavku_konteynerov_fcl_: We organize delivery of containers (FCL) and consolidated cargo (LCL) from the ports of China, Korea and Japan. We select a line, reserve a place on the ship, and control loading.
ved.osnovnoe_napravlenie_shankhay_ninbo_: Main direction. Shanghai, Ningbo, Qingdao, Dalian - regular container lines to Vladivostok and Nakhodka. Duration 7–14 days. Equipment, components, consumer goods.
ved.ostav_te_zayavku_ili_pozvonite_opish: Leave a request or call. Describe what you need to bring and where from - we will calculate the cost, suggest a route and explain the procedure. The initial consultation is free.
ved.podskazyvaem_kakie_dokumenty_nuzhny_: We will advise you on what documents are needed for currency transactions. We help you draw up the contract correctly, taking into account the requirements of bank foreign exchange control.
ved.polnyy_tsikl_morskoy_frakht_iz_tsind: Full cycle: sea freight from Qingdao, coordination of customs clearance in Vladivostok, railway delivery to Khabarovsk. Insurance along the entire route.
ved.pomogaem_podgotovit_dokumenty_dlya_i: We help prepare documents for import: selection of the HS code, calculation of duties, interaction with a customs broker. We accompany you until the cargo is released.
ved.pomogaem_razobrat_sya_v_trebovaniyak: We help you understand the requirements and prepare everything you need for import
ved.pryamye_kontrakty_s_morskimi_liniyam: Direct contracts with shipping lines, road carriers and railway operators. We can quickly select transport for the internal shoulder after customs.
ved.pusan_blizhayshiy_krupnyy_port_3_5_d: Busan is the nearest major port, 3–5 days to Vladivostok. Auto parts, electronics, industrial equipment. High frequency of flights.
ved.rabotaem_s_osnovnymi_torgovymi_partn: We work with Russia's main trading partners in the Asia-Pacific region
ved.rasschitat_postavku_po_ved: Calculate delivery according to foreign trade activities
ved.rasskazhite_chto_nuzhno_privezti_ras: Tell us what you need to bring - we will calculate the cost and suggest a route. Consultation is free, we respond within one business day.
ved.razvivaem_mezhdunarodnoe_napravlenie: We are developing an international direction, relying on practical experience in the ports of the Far East. We help organize the delivery of goods from China, Korea, Japan and the CIS countries - from selecting a route to coordinating customs clearance.
ved.sobiraem_gruzy_ot_neskol_kikh_postav: We collect cargo from several suppliers in a warehouse in China or Korea and send it in a single batch. This reduces the cost for small orders.
ved.stoimost_zavisit_ot_porta_otpravleni: The cost depends on the port of departure, the type of container and current freight rates. Approximately: 20' container from Shanghai or Ningbo to Vladivostok - from 800 USD, from Qingdao - from 650 USD. Exact calculation - within 24 hours after application.
ved.strana_i_gorod_otpravleniya_naimenov: Country and city of departure, name of the product, weight and volume, number of pieces or containers, desired delivery time. If you have an invoice or packing list, attach it to the application, this will speed up the calculation. We will respond within one business day.
ved.stroymaterialy_iz_shankhaya_na_sakha: Construction materials from Shanghai to Sakhalin - 5 containers
ved.vystraivaem_tsepochki_more_zh_d_avto: We build chains “sea + railway + road” for delivery from the port of departure to the recipient’s warehouse in any region of Russia. Particularly effective for the Far East and Siberia.
